title: Ribeirão Preto, SP — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ribeirão Preto, SP: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ribeirão Preto is a city in SP with a population of 720,116. A wealthy agribusiness hub in São Paulo’s interior, known for its chope (draft beer) culture, medical centers, and high quality of life.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
